Package org.eventb.core.preferences.autotactics

Interface IAutoPostTacticManager

All Known Implementing Classes:
AutoPostTacticManager
public interface IAutoPostTacticManager
Facade for the management of auto and post tactics.

An instance can be obtained by calling EventBPlugin.getAutoPostTacticManager().

Since:
2.1

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    IAutoTacticPreference
    getAutoTacticPreference()
     
    IAutoTacticPreference
    getPostTacticPreference()
     
    ITactic
    getSelectedAutoTactics(IEventBRoot root)
    Returns if the auto-tactics are activated, the composed tactic of the selected tactic profile for the given root if there is one, or of the workspace profile.
    ITactic
    getSelectedPostTactics(IEventBRoot root)
    Returns if the post-tactics are activated, the composed tactic of the selected tactic profile for the given root if there is one, or of the workspace profile.

  • Method Details

    • getSelectedAutoTactics

      ITactic getSelectedAutoTactics(IEventBRoot root)
      Returns if the auto-tactics are activated, the composed tactic of the selected tactic profile for the given root if there is one, or of the workspace profile.
      Parameters:
      root - the root for which the auto-tactic profile is retrieved
      Returns:
      the composed tactic of selected auto-tactics for the given root.

    • getSelectedPostTactics

      ITactic getSelectedPostTactics(IEventBRoot root)
      Returns if the post-tactics are activated, the composed tactic of the selected tactic profile for the given root if there is one, or of the workspace profile.
      Parameters:
      root - the root for which the post-tactic profile is retrieved
      Returns:
      the composed tactic of selected post-tactics for the given root.

    • getAutoTacticPreference

      IAutoTacticPreference getAutoTacticPreference()
      Returns:
      the workspace auto-tactic preference

    • getPostTacticPreference

      IAutoTacticPreference getPostTacticPreference()
      Returns:
      the workspace post-tactic preference
